descriptionHtml:
Lagoon 380 S2 for sale 2005 | 4 Guest Cabins | Tax Paid

If you are searching for a comfortable and practical catamaran for cruising with family and friends, this Lagoon 380 S2 for sale 2005 presents a reliable option. Registered under the French flag and with VAT tax paid, she is ready for new adventures. Carefully maintained, this 2005 model is in good condition, offering a thoughtful combination of safety, comfort, and proven seaworthiness.

General Specifications

  • Model: Lagoon 380 S2 for sale 2005
  • Year built: 2005
  • Length: 11.55 m
  • Beam: 6.53 m
  • Draft: 1.20 m
  • Weight: 6000 kg
  • Flag of registry: France
  • Tax: Paid

Accommodation

  • Guest cabins: 4 double cabins
  • Guest heads: 2 bathrooms
  • Water tanks: 2 × 500 L
  • Cooker: 3 burners
  • Oven
  • Refrigerator
  • Hot water system
  • Exterior shower head

Engines

  • Engine 1: Volvo Penta D1 30, 30 hp, year 2005, 4400 hours
  • Engine 2: Volvo Penta D1 30, 30 hp, year 2015, 3300 hours
  • Propulsion: Sail drive, 3 blade propellers

Sails and Rigging

  • Fully battened mainsail
  • Furling genoa (very good condition)
  • Total sails: 6 (battened, 2 reefs, very good condition)

Speed

  • Cruising speed: 8 knots
  • Maximum speed: 10 knots

Electronics and Navigation

  • Raymarine autopilot
  • Raymarine central instruments
  • GPS units (2)
  • Depth sounder
  • Log/Speed
  • Wind speed
  • Plotter
  • Compass
  • VHF radio
  • FM radio/CD player
  • Cockpit speakers
  • LED lighting

Interior Equipment

  • Oven
  • Marine head
  • Electric head
  • Refrigerator
  • Hot water system
  • Electric and manual bilge pumps
  • Sea water pump
  • Battery charger
  • Shore power (with charger)
  • Inverter
  • 220 V sockets throughout
  • Service batteries: 2 × 185 Ah, 3 × 75 Ah
  • 5 ventilation fans

Exterior Equipment

  • Bimini top
  • Lazy bag
  • Gangway
  • Solar panels (2)
  • Swimming ladder
  • Dinghy + Honda 5 HP outboard engine
  • Liferaft
  • Electric windlass + mast chair
  • Tools
  • Anchors: 2
  • Mooring lines + fenders
  • Covers: bimini, lazy bag
  • Lifejackets for 8 people
  • Survival and safety equipment for 8 people

This Lagoon 380 S2 for sale 2005 is ready for inspection and ideal for those seeking a well-equipped catamaran in good condition, with the added reassurance of a fully settled VAT status under the French flag. Contact us now to schedule a viewing or for more information.
